title: -19. The Wife’s Breasts[ ... words ]
content:

Thank you for your continued support. I'm still working hard to bring you more great novels and the best reading experience possible.

Gold grabbed Lorraine by the shoulders and turned her to face him.

Then, with both hands, he roughly seized her large breasts.

“You’re already thirty-two this year, yet you’re still so attractive. I bet adventurers touch these ample breasts of yours quite often, don’t they?” “N-no…” “Don’t lie. Tell me the truth.”

As he spoke, Gold increased the strength and intensity of his groping.

Fearing it would only get worse if she lied, Lorraine decided to answer honestly.

“Y-yes…” “Just as I thought. My eyes weren’t wrong. My job is to make sure you can all work comfortably. Starting tomorrow, I’ll come by the reception desk more often.” “Th-thank you…” “But that and this are two different matters. Even if I’m at the reception, there will be times when I’m not around. There might even be men who touch your breasts right in front of me. Of course I’ll warn them, but when I’m not there, you’ll have to handle it yourself. So, as punishment for this mistake, I’ll be touching your breasts today.” “Understood… Nn!”

Gold’s hands sank deeply into her breasts, and soon his fingers began toying with her nipples.

By now, Gold had completely lost interest in Takuma’s sweatshirt. His eyes were fixed solely on Lorraine’s large breasts.

In fact, perhaps Takuma’s clothes had never been his real target from the beginning.

Her defenseless breasts were being freely played with by Gold’s hands. Lorraine tried to call out for him to stop, but his fingers immediately stimulated her nipples again, cutting off her words.

Even through the fabric, the clear stimulation made her body twitch.

“Come now, if you react like that, you’ll only encourage them. You need to endure it properly.” “Y-yes…!”

Gold told her to endure, but there was no way she could. Her nipples had already become extremely sensitive.

“Shall I open this up?” “Th-that’s…” “It’s part of my job to check what kind of underwear the women of the guild are wearing. You understand, don’t you?” “Understood…”

She tried to protest, but given their positions, Lorraine had no real power to refuse.

Gold untied the top ribbon and began unbuttoning her shirt from the top down. When he reached the fourth button, her large breasts and light pink underwear were revealed.

“I see. Very ladylike underwear. Not too flashy, but not plain either. Yes, it’s very beautiful.” “Thank you…” “But…”

After opening the buttons and staring at her breasts for a moment, Gold once again began groping them.

“Won’t this make your underwear see-through? To the male adventurers, that would make you look like easy prey.” “N-no, I don’t think it’s see-through…” “Why can you say that with such confidence?” “Because I’ve tried it on many times at home… to make sure it doesn’t show through this uniform…”

Lorraine was well aware that she was the face of the guild’s reception desk. This came not only from over ten years of pride in her work, but also from her consideration for others — she didn’t want to cause trouble for anyone.

If she wore overly provocative underwear, the adventurers’ gazes would naturally focus on her. That might be fine for her alone, but there were many other female staff members, most of them younger than her. She didn’t want vulgar eyes turning toward them. That was why she had carefully tested her current underwear at home to ensure it wouldn’t show through the white uniform.

“Oh? So you stood in front of the mirror at home, changing into different underwear one by one and checking each time?” “Y-yes…” “Wonderful!”

As Gold raised his voice, his hands squeezed her breasts even harder.

Even without direct nipple stimulation, the strong sensation made her feel it. Lorraine could sense a wetness forming at the tips of her breasts.

She instinctively tried to look down, but Gold’s hands were covering that area, so she couldn’t see. If Gold noticed… just thinking about it made her body tremble.

“You have a child, don’t you?”

Gold’s unexpected question made Lorraine feel as if her heart had been grabbed. Because what was happening to her body right now was directly connected to his words.

“Y-yes…” “I believe the child is two years old this year.” “That’s correct…” “Becoming a parent really makes a person grow. I have two children myself, and it made me think about many things.”

He spoke smoothly, but his hands never stopped moving. His words and appearance were those of an adult, but the way he groped her breasts was like a child’s.

Because of that, Lorraine’s breasts, against her will, began to fulfill their original purpose — preparing to feed.

“Why don’t you grow a little more here as well…”

Gold’s hands, which had been groping her, finally stopped. His fingers slipped between her breasts and her underwear, ready to pull it down.

His index fingers had already slid in up to the second joint. If he pulled downward, the breasts of this mother of one would be fully exposed.

If he noticed the milk… she didn’t know what he would do next.

Just as Lorraine was about to speak up, bracing herself for Gold’s anger, a knock came at the door of the Guild Master’s office.

“Guild Master Gold. The adventurer you were scheduled to meet today has arrived at the reception desk.”

It was the voice of a familiar male staff member. He was serious and hardworking. Lorraine had trained him, and he had quickly become reliable despite being younger than her.

“…Understood. Show him to the reception room. I’ll be right there.” “Yes, sir.”

Footsteps walked away from the door. Gold withdrew his hands and headed toward the door.

“I got a little too excited. Leave the clothes here and return to the reception desk.” “Understood.” “And make sure you fix your appearance properly, alright?” “Yes.” “Well then, I’m off.” “Take care.”

While covering herself with Takuma’s sweatshirt, Lorraine bowed and saw Gold off.

After confirming the door had closed, she let out a deep sigh and quickly buttoned up her shirt all the way.

“Thank goodness it didn’t leak…”

When she checked the tips of her breasts, the outside of her underwear showed no wetness. However, there were definitely small damp spots on the inside.

After quickly fixing her appearance, Lorraine left the Guild Master’s office as well.
